meaning: adj.镶嵌成小方格的,镶嵌成棋盘格状的v.镶嵌作花纹状
examples: But the trouble with rounded personalities is that they don't tessellate.
Select the polygon where you want to make the holes for the fan and click a few times on the tessellate button.
One simple tip for modeling the wood slates was to tessellate the faces and then add a small noise on the vertex so we can get a nice random surface that gives some realistic look of old wood.
